text: The subject is located in a neighborhood on the eastside of Bloomington, IL. It is a single family detached two-story traditional designed house. It conforms to most other existing homes in the neighborhood in design, quality, and condition. The area is within a mile of schools, recreation, shopping, and centers of employment. The subject neighborhood is bordered to the North by Oakland Ave, to the South by Ireland Grove Rd, to the East by Towanda-Barnes, and West by Hershey Rd.
